CustomField.description: True when the circuit matched in NEPA_Circuit_Risk_Weight__mdt has Low_Data_Confidence__c = true (fewer than 5 PermitTEC cases for that circuit). Set by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer. UI component shows warning: litigation risk estimate for this circuit is based on fewer than 5 historical cases — treat as directional only.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Circuit risk estimate based on fewer than 5 historical cases. Treat as directional guidance only — not a statistical prediction.
CustomField.label: Circuit Small Sample Warning
